title: larix laricina f. lutea
intro: Larix laricina f. lutea, also known as the tamarack golden larch, is a variant of the Larch tree that is native to North America. It is a coniferous evergreen shrub or small tree that is known for its bright yellow foliage and uses in traditional medicine. The medicinal properties of Larix laricina f. lutea include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to reduce swelling and promote wound healing. The health benefits of this plant include reducing stress and anxiety, and it can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil for herbal remedies.
